evals.prompt: Check my inbox — what new emails do I have?
evals.expected_output: Runs mail-cli mail list --unread with JSON filtering. Lists messages but does NOT mark them as read. Asks user if they want to mark as read after displaying.
expectations: Pipes through jq filter to trim output
Does NOT auto-mark as read without asking
Shows from, subject, date for each message

evals.prompt: Send an email to zhang@example.com with subject 'Meeting notes' and body 'Here are the notes from today'.
evals.expected_output: Uses mail-cli compose send with correct flags. Does NOT hardcode the recipient's email — uses the provided address directly.
expectations: Quotes the subject and body correctly

evals.prompt: Forward the email with ID 53:abc123 to my colleague li@example.com.
evals.expected_output: Uses mail-cli compose forward with --id and --to. Default quote mode.

evals.prompt: I just got a GitHub notification email about a failed CI build. Forward it to me urgently.
evals.expected_output: Identifies as P0 triage. Forwards with [紧急] prefix to the human owner email (resolved at runtime). Marks as read after forwarding.
expectations: Resolves owner email via mail-cli clawemail list --json

evals.prompt: I have a bunch of PR review request emails in my inbox. I don't want them forwarded — just collect them into a daily summary.
evals.expected_output: Identifies as P1 triage. Stores metadata in buffer file. Marks as read. Does NOT send individual forwards.
expectations: Mentions daily summary will be sent later
